citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
The written Program of Veterinary Care states that annual visits by the attending veterinarian will be made to the facility.
The facility representative did not provide a date of the last facility visit but stated it has been more than a year since the
last visit. The facility representative said the attending veterinarian was contacted to complete a facility visit but the visit
was not yet scheduled. Failure to follow the Program of Veterinary Care, including the frequency of facility visits, may
negatively impact the health and well-being of the animals.
Correct no later than June 26, 2026 by ensuring the program of veterinary care is followed and regular visits to the
premises by the attending veterinarian are occurring at the frequency defined in the program.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.40(a)(1) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
The written Program of Veterinary Care states that annual visits by the attending veterinarian will be made to the facility. 
The facility representative did not provide a date of the last facility visit but stated it has been more than a year since the 
last visit. The facility representative said the attending veterinarian was contacted to complete a facility visit but the visit 
was not yet scheduled. Failure to follow the Program of Veterinary Care, including the frequency of facility visits, may 
negatively impact the health and well-being of the animals.  
 
Correct no later than June 26, 2026 by ensuring the program of veterinary care is followed and regular visits to the 
premises by the attending veterinarian are occurring at the frequency defined in the program. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative. 
 
 n
